references.name: Linear
observedPatterns: Persistent sidebar with icon + label navigation
Monochromatic color palette with single accent color
Generous whitespace and low information density
Hairline borders for separation instead of shadows
Clean sans-serif typography with precise hierarchy
adaptedElements: Sidebar layout structure with thin left rail
Card design with border-only containers (no shadows)
Muted color palette with blue accent for active states
Compact navigation link styling with active border-left indicator

references.name: Vercel Dashboard
observedPatterns: Near-black text on pure white backgrounds
Stat cards with single metrics and trend indicators
Minimalist form inputs with subtle border focus states
Clean data tables and list views
adaptedElements: Stat card layout with label/value/change structure
Input focus states using border-color transition to accent
Toggle switch design for settings preferences

references.name: Notion
observedPatterns: Workspace-style split pane with tree navigation
Clean editor interface with minimal chrome
adaptedElements: File tree with expand/collapse in workspace view
Clean editor body with code blocks and heading hierarchy
